mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_run (run_id, parent_run_id, root_run_id, request_id, conversation_id, agent_role, run_kind, depth, child_ordinal, question, workspace, status, current_node, step, checkpoint_version, summary_json, blocked_reason, used_tokens, estimated_cost) VALUES (#{runId}, #{parentRunId}, #{rootRunId}, #{requestId}, #{conversationId}, #{agentRole}, #{runKind}, #{depth}, #{childOrdinal}, #{question}, #{workspace}, #{status}, #{currentNode}, #{step}, #{checkpointVersion}, #{summaryJson}, #{blockedReason}, #{usedTokens}, #{estimatedCost}) ON CONFLICT(run_id) DO UPDATE SET parent_run_id = excluded.parent_run_id, root_run_id = excluded.root_run_id, request_id = excluded.request_id, conversation_id = excluded.conversation_id, agent_role = excluded.agent_role, run_kind = excluded.run_kind, depth = excluded.depth, child_ordinal = excluded.child_ordinal, question = excluded.question, workspace = excluded.workspace, status = excluded.status, current_node = excluded.current_node, step = excluded.step, checkpoint_version = excluded.checkpoint_version, summary_json = excluded.summary_json, blocked_reason = excluded.blocked_reason, used_tokens = excluded.used_tokens, estimated_cost = excluded.estimated_cost, update_time = strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ', 'now')
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM agent_run WHERE run_id = #{runId} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM agent_run WHERE parent_run_id = #{parentRunId} ORDER BY child_ordinal ASC, create_time ASC
SELECT * FROM agent_run WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND run_kind = 'ROOT' ORDER BY update_time DESC, create_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT ar.conversation_id, (SELECT question FROM agent_run WHERE conversation_id = ar.conversation_id AND run_kind = 'ROOT' ORDER BY create_time ASC LIMIT 1) as title, COUNT(*) as run_count, (SELECT workspace FROM agent_run WHERE conversation_id = ar.conversation_id ORDER BY update_time DESC LIMIT 1) as workspace FROM agent_run ar WHERE ar.conversation_id NOT IN ( SELECT conversation_id FROM agent_conversation_deletion WHERE status = 'COMPLETED' ) GROUP BY ar.conversation_id ORDER BY MAX(ar.update_time) DESC
